info.title: PubNub REST API
info.description: PubNub is a real-time messaging platform providing publish/subscribe messaging, presence detection, message storage, push notifications, access control, and channel group management via a REST API.

get.summary: Publish a message to a channel (GET)
get.description: Publish a message to the specified channel using a GET request. The message payload is passed as the last path segment, URL-encoded JSON. Maximum payload size is 32 KiB.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: URL-encoded JSON message payload. Maximum size 32 KiB.

parameters.name: ttl
parameters.description: Per-message time-to-live in Storage & Playback, in hours. Can be integer or float.

parameters.name: custom_message_type
parameters.description: User-defined message type. Must be 3-50 characters; alphanumeric, dash, and underscore only.

413.description: Payload too large. Maximum message size is 32 KiB.

post.summary: Publish a message to a channel (POST)
post.description: Publish a message to the specified channel using a POST request. The message is sent in the request body as JSON. Maximum payload size is 32 KiB.

parameters.name: ttl
parameters.description: Per-message time-to-live in Storage & Playback, in hours.

parameters.name: custom_message_type
parameters.description: User-defined message type. Must be 3-50 characters; alphanumeric, dash, and underscore only.

get.summary: Send a signal to a channel
get.description: Send a lightweight signal (max 64 bytes) to a channel. Signals are not stored and do not trigger push notifications.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: URL-encoded JSON signal payload. Maximum 64 bytes.

get.description: Long-poll subscribe to one or more channels. The connection remains open until a message arrives or a timeout occurs. Use the returned timetoken in subsequent requests to receive only new messages.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel name or comma-separated list of channels to subscribe to. Use a comma with no channel names if only subscribing via channel groups.

parameters.name: timetoken
parameters.description: Timetoken for the subscription cursor. Use 0 for initial subscribe to get the latest timetoken.

parameters.name: channel-group
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channel group names to subscribe to.

parameters.name: filter-expr
parameters.description: Stream filter expression to filter messages based on their metadata.

parameters.name: heartbeat
parameters.description: Presence heartbeat timeout in seconds. Overrides default presence timeout.

parameters.name: tt
parameters.description: Timetoken override. Alternative to path-based timetoken.

parameters.name: tr
parameters.description: Region code returned in previous subscribe response.

200.description: Messages received or long-poll timeout with new timetoken.

get.description: Get information about the current occupants of a channel, including UUIDs and state if requested.

parameters.name: disable_uuids
parameters.description: Set to 1 to disable returning UUIDs in the response.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include state information for each UUID.

get.description: Get information about the current occupants of all channels associated with the subscribe key.

parameters.name: disable_uuids
parameters.description: Set to 1 to disable returning UUIDs.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include state information.

get.description: Get the list of channels a given UUID is currently subscribed to.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The UUID to look up.

200.description: List of channels the UUID is present on.

get.description: Get the state data associated with a UUID on a specific channel.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The UUID whose state to retrieve.

200.description: State data for the UUID on the channel.

get.description: Set the state data for a UUID on a specific channel.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The UUID whose state to set.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: URL-encoded JSON state object to set for the UUID.

get.description: Announce presence on a channel and optionally set state. This keeps the UUID present without subscribing.

parameters.name: heartbeat
parameters.description: Presence timeout in seconds.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: URL-encoded JSON state to set for the UUID.

parameters.name: channel-group
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channel groups.

get.description: Explicitly announce departure from a channel, triggering a leave event for other subscribers.

parameters.name: channel-group
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channel groups to leave.

get.summary: Fetch message history for a channel
get.description: Retrieve historical messages published on a channel. Supports pagination with start/end timetokens and count limits.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of messages to return. Default 100, max 100.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Timetoken delimiting the start of the time slice (exclusive). Return messages before this timetoken.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Timetoken delimiting the end of the time slice (inclusive). Return messages after this timetoken.

parameters.name: reverse
parameters.description: If true, return messages in ascending order (oldest first).

parameters.name: include_token
parameters.description: If true, include timetokens with each message.

parameters.name: include_meta
parameters.description: If true, include message metadata.

get.description: Retrieve historical messages with support for multiple channels, message actions, message type, and UUIDs in the response.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channels to retrieve history for (max 500).

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return per channel. Default 100. With include_message_actions, max is 25.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Timetoken delimiting the start of the time slice (exclusive).

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Timetoken delimiting the end of the time slice (inclusive).

parameters.name: reverse
parameters.description: If true, return oldest messages first.

parameters.name: include_meta
parameters.description: Include message metadata in response.

parameters.name: include_message_type
parameters.description: Include message type in response.

parameters.name: include_uuid
parameters.description: Include the UUID of the publisher in response.

parameters.name: include_message_actions
parameters.description: Include message actions in response. When true, max is limited to 25 and only a single channel is allowed.

parameters.name: include_custom_message_type
parameters.description: Include the custom message type in response.

200.description: Historical messages with optional actions and metadata.

get.description: Get the number of unread messages for each specified channel since the given timetokens.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channels.

parameters.name: timetoken
parameters.description: Single timetoken to check all channels, or comma-separated timetokens (one per channel).

parameters.name: channelsTimetoken
parameters.description: Comma-separated timetokens corresponding to each channel.

delete.description: Delete messages from Storage & Playback for a specific channel within an optional time range.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Timetoken delimiting the start of the range to delete (exclusive).

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Timetoken delimiting the end of the range to delete (inclusive).

get.summary: List push notification channels for a device
get.description: List all channels registered for push notifications on the specified device.

200.description: List of channels registered for push.

post.summary: Add push notification channels for a device
post.description: Register one or more channels for push notifications on the specified device.

parameters.name: add
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channels to register for push notifications.

delete.summary: Remove push notification channels for a device
delete.description: Unregister one or more channels from push notifications on the specified device.

parameters.name: remove
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channels to unregister from push notifications.

get.description: Remove all push notification registrations for the specified device.

200.description: All push registrations removed for device.

get.description: Grant read, write, manage, delete, get, update, or join permissions on channels, channel groups, or UUIDs to an auth key. Requires signature-based authentication with the secret key.

parameters.name: signature
parameters.description: Request signature computed using the secret key for verification.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Unix epoch timestamp. Must be within 60 seconds of PubNub server time.

parameters.name: auth
parameters.description: The auth key to grant permissions to. Comma-separated for multiple keys.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Target channel(s), comma-separated.

parameters.name: channel-group
parameters.description: Target channel group(s), comma-separated.

parameters.name: target-uuid
parameters.description: Target UUID(s) for permission grants.

parameters.name: ttl
parameters.description: Time-to-live for the grant in minutes. Default varies by plan. Set to 0 for unlimited.

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: Read permission. 1 to grant, 0 to revoke.

parameters.name: w
parameters.description: Write permission. 1 to grant, 0 to revoke.

parameters.name: m
parameters.description: Manage permission. 1 to grant, 0 to revoke.

parameters.name: d
parameters.description: Delete permission. 1 to grant, 0 to revoke.

parameters.name: g
parameters.description: Get permission. 1 to grant, 0 to revoke.

parameters.name: u
parameters.description: Update permission. 1 to grant, 0 to revoke.

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Join permission. 1 to grant, 0 to revoke.

get.description: Check existing permissions for a subscribe key, optionally filtered by auth key, channel, or channel group.

parameters.name: signature
parameters.description: Request signature for verification.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Unix epoch timestamp.

parameters.name: auth
parameters.description: Auth key to audit. If omitted, audits all auth keys.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel to audit permissions for.

parameters.name: channel-group
parameters.description: Channel group to audit permissions for.

get.description: List all channel groups associated with the subscribe key.

get.summary: List channels in a channel group
get.description: List all channels in the specified channel group.

delete.description: Remove a channel group and all its channel registrations.

get.summary: Add channels to a channel group
get.description: Add one or more channels to the specified channel group.

parameters.name: add
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channels to add to the group.

get.summary: Remove channels from a channel group
get.description: Remove one or more channels from the specified channel group.

parameters.name: remove
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channels to remove from the group.

get.description: Retrieve all message actions for messages in the specified channel, optionally filtered by timetoken range.

parameters.name: message_timetoken
parameters.description: The publish timetoken of the original message.

post.description: Add a message action (such as a reaction) to a published message.

parameters.name: message_timetoken
parameters.description: The publish timetoken of the message to add the action to.

delete.description: Remove a specific message action from a message. Only the user who added the action can remove it.

parameters.name: message_timetoken
parameters.description: The publish timetoken of the original message.

parameters.name: action_timetoken
parameters.description: The timetoken of the message action to remove.

get.description: Returns the current PubNub server time as a 17-digit precision timetoken.

PubKeyPath.name: pub_key
PubKeyPath.description: Your app's publish key from the PubNub Admin Portal.

SubKeyPath.name: sub_key
SubKeyPath.description: Your app's subscribe key from the PubNub Admin Portal.

SubKeyPathV2.name: sub_key
SubKeyPathV2.description: Your app's subscribe key from the PubNub Admin Portal.

ChannelPath.name: channel
ChannelPath.description: The channel name to perform the operation on.

ChannelPathV2.name: channel
ChannelPathV2.description: The channel name to perform the operation on.

CallbackPath.name: callback
CallbackPath.description: JSONP callback function name. Use "0" for no callback (standard JSON response).

PushTokenPath.name: push_token
PushTokenPath.description: Device push token (APNs device token, FCM/GCM registration token, or MPNS channel URI).

UuidQuery.name: uuid
UuidQuery.description: A UTF-8 encoded string of up to 92 characters used to identify the client. Required for most operations.

AuthQuery.name: auth
AuthQuery.description: Authorization key or Access Manager token for permission-controlled access.

StoreQuery.name: store
StoreQuery.description: Override message storage setting. 1 to persist the message, 0 to skip persistence.

MetaQuery.name: meta
MetaQuery.description: URL-encoded JSON object with metadata for the message. Used for stream filtering.

SignatureQuery.name: signature
SignatureQuery.description: Request signature computed using the secret key for Access Manager verification.

TimestampQuery.name: timestamp
TimestampQuery.description: Unix epoch timestamp in seconds. Required when signature is provided. Must be within 60 seconds of PubNub server time.

PnsdkQuery.name: pnsdk
PnsdkQuery.description: SDK identification string in the format "name/version".

SubscribeResponse.description: Subscribe long-poll response with messages and updated timetoken.

t.description: Timetoken object for the next subscribe request.

c.description: Channel the message was published on.

uuids.description: List of UUIDs present on the channel.

payload.description: The state data for the UUID.
The state data that was set.

more.description: Pagination cursor for fetching additional results.

channels.description: Map of channel name to unread message count.

ttl.description: Time-to-live for the grant in minutes.

value.description: Message action value (e.g., emoji or custom string).

uuid.description: UUID of the user who added the action.

actionTimetoken.description: Timetoken when the action was added.

tags.name: Subscribe
tags.description: Subscribe to channels and channel groups for real-time messages

tags.name: Presence
tags.description: Detect who is online, join/leave events, and user state

tags.name: Storage & Playback
tags.description: Message history, fetch historical messages, delete messages, and message counts

tags.name: Push Notifications
tags.description: Manage push notification registrations for devices

tags.name: Access Manager
tags.description: Grant and revoke permissions on channels, channel groups, and UUIDs

tags.name: Channel Groups
tags.description: Manage channel groups for multiplexed subscriptions

tags.name: Message Actions
tags.description: Add, get, and remove message actions (reactions) on messages
